title: Best Forge Client Modpack
description: add beauty to the game + interface, optimizes the game and simply makes minecraft more comfortable
body:
[![SparkedHost](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1460304641236668511/1461763448441405532/Artboard_3.png?ex=696bbccc&is=696a6b4c&hm=e337c59f0d19fe2de554a07f4c371d8f6c815247c4ca690bb132b334efe231e9&)](https://billing.sparkedhost.com/aff.php?aff=3089)
I think this is the best forge+optifine client modpack. Because I haven't seen a single client modpack that contains optifine. This modpack adds client mods which means you can play on servers with players and the mods will work. Client Mods adds beauty, optimization, simplification, and comfort

beauty is for example falling leaves, Presence Footsteps, bubbles pops, itemphysics, cave dust, visuality, 3d skin layers

These mods add beauty, comfort and atmosphere to the game.

optimization mods such as modernfix, memoryleakfix, optifine, ferritecore, entity culling, fastload, dynamicfps, canary, smooth boot.

These mods give performance to the game so that you have more fps.

simplified mods such as lighty, freecam, shuffle.

these mods make your game a little easier.

Also, all these mods intend to make your game more comfortable

I apologize if there are any problems related to the modpack

common game crash problem is modernfix try downloading the previous version of the mod

also a rather old version of Forge is installed here, because Modrint does not allow you to install the newest one, if it starts to interfere or conflict with mods, just download the new one separately into your launcher

**you need to download optifine here is the link: https://optifine.net/adloadx?f=OptiFine_1.20.1_HD_U_I6.jar** because it is not available on modrinth
and **Presence Footsteps(forge): https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/presence-footsteps-forge/files/5015286** , because it’s not available on modrinth too

If you suddenly have problems with a modpack, it is better to download each mod that is on the list separately.

**overrides/mods/AdvancementPlaques-1.20.1-forge-1.5.1.jar**

Special list

Optimized Mods:Optifine,Dynamic FPS,Entity Culling,Memory Leak Fix,Fastload,ModernFix,Canary,FerriteCore,Smooth Boot (Reloaded).

"BugFix":No Chat Reports,Not Enough Crashes,Model Gap Fix.

Interface"Shulker Box Tooltip,Bounced,Cherished Worlds,BetterF3,Chat Impressive Animation,AppleSkin,Traveler's Titles,Server Country Flags,Resourcify,Chat Heads,Better Ping Display [Forge],Legendary Tooltips,ESSENTIAL Mod,Emoji Type,ReBlured,Tiny Item Animations,AdvancementPlaques,BetterAdvancements,CraftPresence,Simple Voice Chat.


Gaming Beauty:Falling Leaves (Forge).Boat Item View,Better Third Person,Not Enough Animations,ItemPhysic Lite,Make Bubbles Pop,Cave Dust,ESSENTIAL Mod,Emotecraft,Visuality: Reforged,3D Skin Layers,Fog Looks Modern Now,First-person Model.

Sounds:Presence Footsteps [Forge],Ding,Drip Sounds (Forge),Make Bubbles Pop,ExtraSounds Forge,Sound Physics Remastered,Simple Voice Chat.

Libs-Api:Prism,Iceberg,Cloth Config API,CreativeCore,MaFgLib,YUNG's API,playerAnimator,Architectury API,Kotlin for Forge,ash_api-forge.


auxiliary mods: Lighty, Freecam (Modrinth Edition),Shuffle,ClearDespawn.
